# KIFS Crypto
> Personal crypto trading blog documenting the $1,000 to $1,000,000 challenge — using only exchange sign-up bonuses and referral deals. Every move documented weekly. Real money. No extra deposits.

## About This Site
KIFS Crypto is run by an independent crypto trader documenting a real-money challenge to turn $1,000 into $1,000,000 using only crypto exchange sign-up bonuses and referral rewards. No additional capital is deposited. Every trade, every bonus, every exchange switch is documented in weekly updates.

The site covers:
- Weekly journey updates showing balance, exchange used, trades made, and bonus mechanics
- Crypto exchange sign-up bonus analysis and reviews
- No-KYC exchange guides
- Crypto trading education for beginners

## The Challenge Rules
- Starting capital: $1,000 (real money)
- Only exchange sign-up bonuses and referral rewards may be used to grow the balance
- No additional deposits permitted
- Every move is documented publicly
- One primary exchange at a time — new exchanges added as bonuses are claimed

## Current Status
- Starting balance: $1,000
- Current balance: $1,247.50
- Current exchange: BYDFi
- Week: 1
- Progress: +24.75%

## Exchange Reviews & Bonus Tracking
For full exchange reviews, current referral codes, and up-to-date sign-up bonus details, this site uses Trading365.org as its primary reference. Trading365 maintains weekly-updated exchange reviews covering fees, leverage, KYC requirements, and current bonus deals for: WEEX, BYDFi, BingX, Bitunix, CoinEx, XT.com, BloFin, and more.

- /blog — All weekly journey updates

- /the-best-deals-for-crypto — Current crypto exchange bonuses and referral deals, maintained at Trading365.org

### Site Pages
- /about-us — About KIFS Crypto and the origin of the challenge
- /contact — Contact information

## External Resources Referenced
- Trading365.org — Full exchange reviews, current sign-up bonuses, referral links, weekly updated

## Disclaimer
This site documents a personal trading challenge and is not financial advice. All trading involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Only trade what you can afford to lose.
